output_format.description: Select output destination: excel, google_sheets, or both.
output_format.title: Output Format

google_credentials_json.description: Leave blank — read from GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON env var.
google_credentials_json.title: Google Credentials JSON (optional override)

google_share_email.description: Leave blank — read from GOOGLE_SHARE_EMAIL env var.
google_share_email.title: Google Share Email (optional override)

google_spreadsheet_id.description: Leave blank — read from GOOGLE_SPREADSHEET_ID env var. Accepts bare ID or full URL.
google_spreadsheet_id.title: Google Spreadsheet ID (optional override)
